2026-0401
2026-04-29PMOOther Than Statutory AuthorityOrder directing a Commission do issue empowering the administration of OathsOrder directing that a COMMISSION do issue under the Great Seal of Canada empowering Shannon Lewis to administer the Oath of Allegiance, the Oath of Office or any other Oath as may from time to time be prescribed by law.N/A
subject: Order directing a Commission do issue empowering the administration of Oaths
precis: Order directing that a COMMISSION do issue under the Great Seal of Canada empowering Shannon Lewis to administer the Oath of Allegiance, the Oath of Office or any other Oath as may from time to time be prescribed by law.
